chain.thought: Explanation: To determine who served in 1949, we look for mid-level officers whose service includes the year 1949. Georges-Henri Héon took office and left office in 1949, so he served in 1949. All others have terms outside 1949 and did not serve that year. Therefore, 1 served in 1949 and 7 did not.

judge_thought: Explanation: Only Georges-Henri Héon has 1949 within his term (took and left office in 1949), so 1 served in 1949. The remaining 7 entries have terms outside 1949, so 7 did not serve in 1949. Thus the predicted "1|7" matches the counts.
